plan.title: Add Dark Chime meditation voice (lower, minor)

narratives.Description: Add Dark Chime meditation voice (lower, minor)
narratives.LockedDecisions: Implement #66 (2026-07-14): (1) Catalog id `dark-chime`, label "Dark Chime", synth key `darkChime`. (2) Fundamental A3 (220.00 Hz) — 3 semitones below Chime C4 (261.63); still a chime, not Bell/doomBell depth. (3) Darker minor stack: soft hum 0.5×, stronger minor-third tierce 1.2×, reduced high shimmer; ~9 s ring. (4) Defaults match Chime (7.5 min / 0.4). (5) Existing Chime untouched.
narratives.Overview:
## Summary

Add a new meditation voice **Dark Chime**: a slightly lower, darker sibling of the existing **Chime**, with a clear minor sonority.

## Context — existing Chime

Catalog (`src/lib/meditation.ts`):

- **id / label**: `chime` / "Chime"
- **description**: "Low, ringing chime with a minor-third shimmer"
- Defaults: interval 7.5 min, volume 0.4

Synth (`src/audio/voices.ts` — `chime` player):

- Struck additive tone, fundamental **C4 (261.63 Hz)**
- Partials include a **~minor-third** tierce (`1.2×`) plus higher partials; ~8 s ring
- Comment notes it sits above Bell (C3) and doom bell (F2), sharing bittersweet minor-third character

## Requirements

1. **Name**: "Dark Chime" (catalog label; stable `id` e.g. `darkChime` — follow existing voice id conventions).
2. **Pitch**: slightly **lower** than current Chime (C4 / 261.63 Hz) — a modest drop (e.g. ~1–3 semitones), still recognizably a chime, not as deep as Bell/doomBell.
3. **Harmony / character**: **minor** sonority (minor-third or darker minor-flavored partial stack), more shadowed than the existing Chime while keeping the struck/ringing chime envelope family.
4. Wire into the meditation voice catalog, synth registry, and any UI/preview paths that enumerate voices.
5. Do **not** replace or retune the existing Chime unless needed for shared helpers; Dark Chime is an additive option.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] New catalog entry with label **Dark Chime**, sensible description, and default interval/volume consistent with other struck voices.
- [ ] Synth implementation plays a lower, minor-character struck chime (audible vs Chime in preview).
- [ ] Voice appears in meditation settings / voice picker and preview works.
- [ ] Tests updated (e.g. `meditation.test.ts` voice-id list / related coverage) so the new voice is included where the suite asserts catalog completeness.
- [ ] No regression to existing Chime (still C4-ish minor-third chime).

## Out of scope

- Retuning Bell, doomBell, or break-cue chimes.
- New UI chrome beyond listing/previewing the new voice like the others.

items.title: New catalog entry with label **Dark Chime**, sensible description, and default interval/volume consistent with other struck voices.
Synth implementation plays a lower, minor-character struck chime (audible vs Chime in preview).
Voice appears in meditation settings / voice picker and preview works.
Tests updated (e.g. `meditation.test.ts` voice-id list / related coverage) so the new voice is included where the suite asserts catalog completeness.
No regression to existing Chime (still C4-ish minor-third chime).
